offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent receipt management causes delayed payments. We automate receipt verification and categorization instead of manual tracking and submission of receipts.
problem: Inconsistent receipt management and delayed invoice submissions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try receipt verification on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
